entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT MAP
entities.description: A high spatial resolution map indicating cropland and non-cropland areas used for agricultural analysis

entities.name: FOOD AND WATER SECURITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of food and water security that requires precise cropland extent maps

entities.name: CROP WATERING METHODS
entities.description: Methods of watering crops, such as irrigated or rainfed

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITIES
entities.description: The frequency of cropping on a piece of land, such as single, double, or continuous cropping

entities.name: CROP TYPES
entities.description: The specific types of crops grown in a given area

entities.name: CROPLAND FALLOWS
entities.description: Cropland that is left unseeded for a period of time

entities.name: CROPLAND PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The productivity of crops per unit of land

entities.name: CROP WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The productivity of crops per unit of water used

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continental region focused on for the cropland extent mapping

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region mentioned as having small-holder dominant agricultural systems

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud-based geospatial computing platform used for processing satellite imagery and mapping

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite providing high-resolution (10-20m) multi-spectral data

entities.name: LANDSAT-8
entities.description: A satellite providing 30m resolution multi-spectral data

entities.name: MEDIAN-MOSAIC
entities.description: A technique used to create satellite imagery composites by taking the median value of pixels

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used as a band in imagery composites

entities.name: SHUTTLE RADAR TOPOGRAPHIC MISSION
entities.description: An elevation dataset used to derive a 30-m slope layer

entities.name: PIXEL-BASED CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A classification approach that assigns a class to each individual pixel

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A supervised classification algorithm used as the primary classifier for cropland mapping

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE
entities.description: A classification algorithm used to compensate for over-fitting issues of Random Forest

entities.name: RECURSIVE HIERARCHICAL SEGMENTATION
entities.description: An algorithm used to generate an object-oriented segmentation layer

entities.name: OBJECT-ORIENTED SEGMENTATION
entities.description: A segmentation approach based on spectral and spatial properties to improve mapping accuracy

entities.name: ERROR MATRIX APPROACH
entities.description: A method used to compute the accuracy of the cropland extent product using validation samples

entities.name: LULC MAPS
entities.description: Land Use Land Cover maps used for spatial similarity comparison

entities.name: UN FAO STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistics from the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations used for area comparison

entities.name: TOTAL NET CROPLAND AREA
entities.description: The estimated total area of cropland in Africa for a specific year

entities.name: GFSAD30AFCE
entities.description: The Global Food Security-support Analysis Data @ 30-m for the African Continent, Cropland Extent product
